title: Set A Chart by Month with a New Line For Each Year
excerpt: I have a column that puts the date for new leads that come in on my dashboard. I am trying to put a chart together where the X axis is the number of leads generated by month and the Y access is the count. I am using the …

posts.author: MichaelMutz (Michael Mutz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a column that puts the date for new leads that come in on my dashboard. I am trying to put a chart together where the X axis is the number of leads generated by month and the Y access is the count. I am using the line chart. Is there a way for me to make the X axis JUST the 12 months of the year (not May 2020, June 2022, … November 2022, December 2022 etc.) and then put multiple lines on the chart (one color for each year) so it is possible to see leads generated in May 2020, May 2021, May 2022, etc. all stacked in the May column by count?

Not sure if that makes sense but it would be awesome and way more helpful than a chart with 50 months one after another.

posts.author: JFergus (Joseph Fergus)
posts.cookedHtml: I too am trying to do something similar with a line graph to compare sales from this year that is active vs the previous year to see performance on a monthly break down. So seeing how January 2026 sales compared to January 2025 sales

posts.author: Renae-JTsCloud (Renae-upstream)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JFergus ,

you could write a prompt for a vibe app that can build this chart exactly how you want it!

https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/28451758349842-Get-started-with-monday-vibe
